partialRuntimeEvidence: Real provider is intentionally not called; request shape, provider containment, and UI behavior are verified through local Playwright route interception.

repeatedInterruptions.note: Pre-existing F1 evidence files and prior T1-T4 artifacts were present before this run; this script records a fresh F1 browser/debug/cleanup artifact set.

risks.cancelResume: not applicable; no cancel/resume flow is exercised or added
risks.dirtyWorktree: pre/post tracked status is captured; unrelated product-code dirt is treated as pre-existing
risks.flakyTests: rerun the exact command once if this script fails from timing
risks.malformedInput: points to recorded Todo 1/3 malformed evidence unless a future F1 script adds a malformed-response check
risks.promptInjection: not applicable; no untrusted external text is consumed
risks.staleState: covered by H1 in this run and by prior Todo 4 two-tool stale-state evidence
